faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with placements and training.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placed in our college. Students who scored more than 60% in all semesters got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 5.5 LPA, and the average salary package offered was 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies were TCS, Wipro, Accenture, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Deloitte, Mindtree, etc. Top roles offered were software engineer, SDE, and data analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were well-equipped with Wi-Fi, projectors, and screens. All labs and digital libraries were well-maintained. Medical facilities were good. The hostel rooms are very well with 24X7 security. The campus was under CCTV surveillance.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: RLJIT is a great engineering college and a great stage for students to improve leadership skills.

review_content.Placements: The placement was a big issue, and it exists even now. Around 5% of the students were placed through campus recruitment. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and 1.2 LPA was the lowest package offered. Companies like Tech Mahindra, Infosys, TAFE, etc., visited our campus. The college has provided us with references for internships, and we only worked hard for getting an internship to complete our course. I don't remember the stipend offered. A placement cell (R & D team also) is present in the college. They were very efficient in inviting companies to the campus. But, the students' overall development is poor, and students lacked innovative ideas. VTU's syllabus is also to be blamed. The students should think and act according to the requirements of the companies. Being only a studious and book worm won't fetch much in the outside world. There is a demand for skills and only doing hard work won't take us to higher places. To achieve big, we must think big. RLJIT and its teaching faculty were a great source of inspirations for me personally. They have taught us morals and human values, and how the world outside college works, how important it is for us to build a career and not just getting a job.

paragraphs: IREED Academy, Gurgaon Admission 2025 is open. The institute offers MBA programme across multiple specialisations along with certificate courses. Admission to IREED Academy, Gurgaon courses is merit as well as entrance-based. IREED Academy, Gurgaon offers a two-year MBA at the PG level in the Management stream. Candidates can fill out the application form online on the official website of the institute. Check out the table below for admission highlights of IREED Academy, Gurgaon:

Admission to the flagship course MBA programme is based on merit. Admission to all the courses offered by IREED Academy, Gurgaon is subject to merit in the entrance exam, selection rounds, and past academic records. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for all programmes:
Bachelor's Degree with 50% aggregate from a recognised university
Proficiency in English (TOEFL/IELTS scores for international applicants)
Merit-based

The admission process for IREED Academy, Gurgaon, is a multi-step process inclusive of application, appearance in the selection rounds, admission process, and document verification. A step-by-step process that students need to follow is as follows:
STEP 1: IREED Academy, Gurgaon Application Process 2025

The application process for all programmes at IREED Academy, Gurgaon, is done online. Candidates can fill out the IREED Academy, Gurgaon application form 2025 on the official website for the respective course accepting exam as given above. The registration fee for all programmes varies as per the counselling bodies & official website of IREED Academy, Gurgaon.
STEP 2: IREED Academy, Gurgaon Selection Process 2025

Candidates who've applied for any course at IREED Academy, Gurgaon must qualify the eligibility criteria. After qualifying the minimum eligibility criteria, candidates have to appear for the Written Assessment Test, Personal Interview, and their past academic record. The shortlisted candidates will be selected for the course.
STEP 3: IREED Academy, Gurgaon Document Verification & Payment of Admission Fee

Selected candidates need to attend the selection process on the designated date and time along with the original copies of all their relevant documents. Shortlisted aspirants will receive an admission letter through email as well as by post. They will have to pay the specified fee before the deadline to confirm their seat in the institute.
